2606.20738.title: An approach with Visual and Tabular Mamba to multimodal medical data using Mixed Fusion
2606.20738.paper_summary: This article presents a complementary approach for integrating multimodal medical data in cancer classification, based on state space models represented by the Mamba architecture. To this end, a mixed multimodal fusion architecture, called Mixed Fusion, was employed and developed to enhance the interpretability of the decision-making process. The proposed approach explores two variants of Mamba: one dedicated to visual processing, responsible for classifying the lesion image and generating probabilities associated with the target classes, and another focused on tabular processing, which uses these probabilities together with clinical and/or sociodemographic data to produce the final diagnosis. The experiments were conducted on two medical datasets: PAD-UFES-20, composed of clinical images and information associated with skin lesions, and NDB-UFES, consisting of histopathological images and sociodemographic data related to oral cancer. The results indicate slightly lower performance in balanced accuracy, compared with Transformer-based approaches, on PAD-UFES-20, and superior performance on NDB-UFES. Additionally, substantial gains were observed in the recall metric. Furthermore, the adoption of the Mixed Fusion architecture enables the application of the Shapley Additive Explanations (SHAP) method, increasing the interpretability of the results. These findings indicate that Mamba-based models constitute a suitable alternative for multimodal classification in medical data, especially in scenarios in which sensitivity is a relevant requirement.
2606.20738.paper_summary_zh: 這篇文章提出了一種補充方法，用於整合多模態醫療數據以進行癌症分類，基於由Mamba架構表示的狀態空間模型。為此，採用了混合多模態融合架構，稱為Mixed Fusion，旨在增強決策過程的可解釋性。所提出的方法探索了Mamba的兩個變體：一個專注於視覺處理，負責分類病變圖像並生成與目標類別相關的概率，另一個則專注於表格處理，利用這些概率結合臨床和/或社會人口數據來產生最終診斷。實驗在兩個醫療數據集上進行：PAD-UFES-20，由臨床圖像和與皮膚病變相關的信息組成，以及NDB-UFES，由與口腔癌相關的組織病理學圖像和社會人口數據組成。結果顯示，在PAD-UFES-20上，與基於Transformer的方法相比，平衡準確性略低，而在NDB-UFES上表現更佳。此外，在召回率指標上觀察到了顯著的增益。此外，採用Mixed Fusion架構使得可以應用Shapley加法解釋（SHAP）方法，從而提高結果的可解釋性。這些發現表明，基於Mamba的模型構成了醫療數據多模態分類的合適替代方案，特別是在靈敏度是相關要求的場景中。
2606.20738.author: Matheus B. Rocha et.al.
2606.20738.authors: Matheus B. Rocha, Gustavo B. Dettogni, Renato A. Krohling
